texts.name: Faelin
texts.biography: Faelin moves to a rhythm heard only by the smallest spirits of the forest. Wherever she goes, glittering flocks of Fairies and Sylvan Fairies gather around her, their playfulness turning into a dangerous weapon. Under her command they become swifter, more precise and unexpectedly deadly. Many see them as harmless lights in the thicket, until Faelin turns their dance into a storm.

specialty.description:
{Fairies and Sylvan Fairies}

Increases the Speed of Fairies and Sylvan Fairies by 1, and their Attack and Defense by 5% for every 2 hero levels (rounded up).
specialty.name: Fairies
